ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-10-2020 Continued To Oct-19-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Peter Bresler appearing by Zoom for Ming Yu Wu.

The Court stated that there were a lot of probate examiner notes. Mr. Bresler stated that there are two related cases, that in the related matter of the Estate of Nancy Chew; Case No. PES-20-303699 that they have a hearing set in September, that the petition for probate in the other case needs to be accepted, and that one line about distribution can be withdrawn. Mr. Bresler requested a continuance to allow time for them to satisfy this Court. The Petition for First and Final Report of Administrator on Waiver of Account, and Petition for Allowance of Compensation to Attorney for Ordinary Fees, for Reimbursement of Costs to Attorney, and for Final Distribution is continued to October 19, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court addressed Mr. Bresler noting that he should have letters in the other case in September.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Probate Examiner: Probate Director Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Matter not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-20-2020 Continued To Aug-10-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler by zoom for Ming Wu.

The Court asked Mr. Bresler why he has not filed a response to the Probate Examiner's notes. Mr. Bresler apologized to the Court stating that there is no good reason at all and that he may have gotten confused with another case. The First and Final Report of Administrator on Waiver of Account, etc. is continued to August 10, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.
